name: Small Squirrel Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™: Crinkle Plush for All Breeds, Soft Cuddle Fun with Polyester Fill
description:
Your pup will have a hopping good time with the Small Squirrel Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. With oh-so-adorable raccoon face detailing on a textured backdrop, ears and striped tail, this plush dog toy is designed with a soft fill and durable exterior that'll have your pet cuddle and toss it around for hours of entertainment and fun. Whether you and your pup are playing a frisky game of fetch or happily squeaking it, this small squirrel toy brings instant joy for your pup.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
